CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-07-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal Exhibits 13-19 To The Declaration Of Eloise Backer In Support Of Plaintiffs Mars, Information Services, Incs Motion For Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Dec-02-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JOEL MUCHMORE OF ARENT FOX LLP, TEL. NO. 1-415-757-5500 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFFS;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFFS MARS, INCORPORATED AND MARS INFORMATION SERVICES, INC.'S Motion To Seal Exhibits 13-19 To The Declaration Of Eloise Backer In Support Of Plaintiffs Mars, Information Services, Inc's Motion For Preliminary Injunction is Granted. The moving party provided the court with a proof of service of the motion papers on defendants. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/hk
